metadata.title: Oxford English Primary 3 (Shanghai Edition)
metadata.subtitle: 牛津上海版小学英语三年级下册

unit1.name: Colours
unit1.topic: 学习各种颜色和简单的颜色描述

dialogues.title: Dialogue 1: What colour do you like?

lines.speaker: Alice
lines.text: What colour do you like, Ben?

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: I like blue. What about you?

unit2.name: Tastes
unit2.topic: 学习描述食物和饮料的味道

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: Tom, what fruit do you want?

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: It's sweet. I like sweet fruits.

unit3.name: Sounds
unit3.topic: 学习交通工具和相关声音词汇

sentences.chinese: 我能听到公共汽车的声音。
我能听到自行车的声音。

unit4.name: Animals
unit4.topic: 学习动物园里的动物名称和描述

sentences.english: Do you like playing with dolls?
I like my toys very much.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: Yes, I know. What present do you want?

lines.speaker: Alice
lines.text: I want a big teddy bear, please.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: OK! I will buy one for you.

unit6.name: Food and drinks
unit6.topic: 学习食物和饮料的名称

sentences.english: I'm hungry. I want some food.
Let's have some bread and eggs.
sentences.chinese: 让我们吃些面包和鸡蛋吧。

sentences.english: I have rice and chicken for lunch.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: Tom, what fruit do you want to buy?

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: I want some apples and bananas, please.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: OK. What drinks do you want?

sentences.english: The house has a triangle roof.
I need a pair of gloves.

lines.speaker: Kitty
lines.text: Yes, I like it. It's nice.

unit9.name: Seasons
unit9.topic: 学习季节和活动相关词汇

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: Look at the sky. It's blue.

unit11.name: My day
unit11.topic: 学习出行和活动相关词汇

lines.speaker: Kitty
lines.text: Good idea! I like the park.

unit12.name: Three little pigs
unit12.topic: 学习和讲述三只小猪的故事

sentences.english: Once upon a time, there were three little pigs.
The first pig built a house of straw.
sentences.chinese: 第一只小猪建了一座稻草房子。

sentences.english: The second pig built a house of sticks.
sentences.chinese: 第二只小猪建了一座树枝房子。

sentences.english: The third pig built a house of bricks.
sentences.chinese: 第三只小猪建了一座砖头房子。

sentences.english: The wolf blew down the houses.
The third pig was very clever.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: Once upon a time, there were three little pigs.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: They wanted to build their own houses.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: The first pig built his house with straw.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: The second pig built his house with sticks.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: The third pig worked hard and built a strong house of bricks.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: A big bad wolf came. He blew down the first house.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: He blew down the second house too.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: But he couldn't blow down the third house.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: The three little pigs were safe. They lived happily ever after.

exercises.question: 第一只小猪用什么建房子？
